description_long: This is a monumental grave sculpture featuring a life-sized, draped female figure in a classical pose, standing atop a stone pedestal. The figure appears to be made of weathered bronze, with one arm raised and the other resting at her side, evoking a sense of mourning or contemplation. The pedestal is adorned with a circular relief and sits at the head of a large, rectangular stone grave marker, which is inscribed and decorated with a floral motif. The entire structure is set on a grassy base, with fallen leaves scattered around, suggesting an outdoor cemetery or memorial park setting. The materials and craftsmanship indicate a traditional, commemorative function, likely marking the resting place of an individual or family. The overall impression is solemn and dignified, with a strong sense of permanence and respect.
description: A classical bronze female figure stands atop a stone pedestal and grave marker, set on a grassy base with inscriptions and relief details. The sculpture exudes a solemn, commemorative presence typical of cemetery monuments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, pedestal with relief, and inscribed grave marker with floral motif.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outstretched arm of the figure and the depth of the pedestal and grave marker.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the draped back of the figure and the plain back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the length of the grave marker.
attribute_subject_matter: classical draped female figure atop a grave monument
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a grassy patch, likely within a cemetery or memorial park.
